fato_historico: 1910: The Ottoman Empire captures the city of Shkodër, putting down the Albanian Revolt of 1910.
energia_do_dia: The universe invites you to seek expansion today. Much like historical stories of overcoming barriers and navigating shifting borders, you may find that your current challenges are simply landscapes waiting to be explored. Consider shifting your perspective; perhaps this is a wonderful time to release old limitations and pursue the freedom your spirit truly craves.
frase_do_dia: Every step toward the unknown expands the horizon of your beautiful soul.
significado_numero: Represents the harmonious balance between your ambitious dreams and daily growth.
conselho: Trust your intuition and keep your heart open to unexpected new possibilities.
